mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book WHERE category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b.category_id FROM book b WHERE b.book_id IN ( SELECT oi.book_id FROM orderitem oi WHERE oi.order_id IN ( SELECT o.order_id FROM orders o WHERE o.member_idx = #{member_idx} ) ) ) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 10

SELECT * FROM book WHERE category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b.category_id FROM book b WHERE b.book_id IN ( SELECT oi.book_id FROM orderitem oi WHERE oi.order_id IN ( SELECT o.order_id FROM wishlist w JOIN orders o ON w.member_idx = o.member_idx WHERE w.member_idx = #{member_idx} ) ) )

SELECT * FROM book
ORDER by book_price ASC
ORDER by book_price DESC
ORDER BY book_popularity DESC
ORDER BY publish_date DESC

SELECT * FROM book
ORDER by book_price ASC
ORDER by book_price DESC
ORDER BY publish_date DESC
ORDER BY book_id DESC

SELECT * FROM book WHERE category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b.category_id FROM book b WHERE b.book_id IN ( SELECT oi.book_id FROM orderitem oi WHERE oi.order_id IN ( SELECT o.order_id FROM orders o WHERE o.member_idx = #{member_idx} ) ) )
ORDER BY popularity DESC
ORDER BY publish_date DESC
ORDER BY book_price ASC
ORDER BY book_price DESC
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 10

SELECT b.* FROM book b WHERE b.category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b2.category_id FROM book b2 WHERE b2.book_id IN ( SELECT oi.book_id FROM orderitem oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.member_idx = #{member_idx} ) )
ORDER BY ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orderitem oi2 WHERE oi2.book_id = b.book_id ) DESC
ORDER BY b.publish_date DESC
ORDER BY b.book_price ASC
ORDER BY b.book_price DESC
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 10

SELECT b.* FROM book b WHERE b.category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b2.category_id FROM book b2 WHERE b2.book_id IN ( SELECT oi.book_id FROM orderitem oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN wishlist w ON w.member_idx = o.member_idx WHERE w.member_idx = #{member_idx} ) )
ORDER BY ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orderitem oi2 WHERE oi2.book_id = b.book_id ) DESC
ORDER BY b.publish_date DESC
ORDER BY b.book_price ASC
ORDER BY b.book_price DESC
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 10
